objective: Restore the default Codex reviewer persona path used by `scripts/codex-review-template.sh` so audit and critique modes reach `codex-fire.sh` without requiring an operator override.
scope_boundary: Fake-Codex e2e coverage for default and override persona paths
Issue #337 planning, execution-scope, review, validation, closeout, backlog, and feature-registry evidence
out_of_scope: Changing GitHub Actions Codex canary behavior
Changing the local #200 fail-fast wrapper semantics beyond tests required for this default-persona bug
research_summary: Issue #200 added `CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA` as an override while routing audit and critique modes through `codex-fire.sh`, but the template still defaults to `docs/agents/codex-reviewer.md`. The current governance checkout does not track that default file, so normal audit/critique invocations can fail before reaching the wrapper. The fix is to restore a canonical tracked persona at the default path and prove both default and override paths through fake-Codex e2e tests.

sprints.name: Planning and scope
sprints.goal: Create issue-backed governance artifacts before modifying the review template support path.
acceptance_criteria: Execution scope covers only issue #337 files and generated closeout artifacts
No downstream repository writes are required

sprints.name: Persona restoration and tests
sprints.goal: Restore the tracked default persona and prove the template reaches `codex-fire.sh` without an override.
tasks: Add fake-Codex e2e coverage for default persona routing
Keep fake-Codex e2e coverage for `CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA` override routing
acceptance_criteria: Default audit mode no longer fails due to a missing persona file
E2E fake-Codex tests prove both paths reach the wrapper

sprints.name: Review and closeout
sprints.goal: Validate through local tests, governance gates, Local CI, focused review, Stage 6 closeout, and GitHub checks.
tasks: Merge only after PR checks pass
acceptance_criteria: Final AC includes fake-Codex e2e proof for default and override persona paths
GitHub PR checks pass before merge

specialist_reviews.focus: Persona default, override behavior, and fake-Codex e2e coverage
specialist_reviews.summary: Focused review found the initial implementation PR shape would fail planner-boundary CI because the execution scope was introduced in the same implementation PR. Planning-only PR #340 landed the trusted scope first; the rebuilt implementation branch uses that base and keeps the behavioral fix narrow.

alternate_model_review.summary: No separate Claude connector is available in this Codex session and the operator directed no HITL; same-family implementation is accepted for this narrow governance tooling bug with deterministic fake-Codex tests, local CI, GitHub checks, and focused subagent review before merge.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Proceed with issue #337 Codex review-template default persona restoration and tests.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Add the persona doc, tests, review, validation, closeout, and PR evidence.

material_deviation_rules: Do not bypass `codex-fire.sh` for audit or critique modes.
If the default persona path changes again, update both the template and e2e tests in the same PR.
